'''âk-d-ng''' ('''kakadang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:censor|censor]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-d-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:censor|censor]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-d-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kakadang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikadang|thikadang]] || [[word:jikadang|jikadang]] || [[word:shikadang|shikadang]] || [[word:kikadang|kikadang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukadang|thuthukadang]] || [[word:jujukadang|jujukadang]] || [[word:shushukadang|shushukadang]] || [[word:kukukadang|kukukadang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukadang|thukadang]] || [[word:jukadang|jukadang]] || [[word:shukadang|shukadang]] || [[word:kukadang|kukadang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukadang|thukadang]] || [[word:jukadang|jukadang]] || [[word:shukadang|shukadang]] || [[word:kukadang|kukadang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekadang|thekadang]] || [[word:jekadang|jekadang]] || [[word:shekadang|shekadang]] || [[word:kekadang|kekadang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokadang|thothokadang]] || [[word:jojokadang|jojokadang]] || [[word:shoshokadang|shoshokadang]] || [[word:kokokadang|kokokadang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokadang|thokadang]] || [[word:jokadang|jokadang]] || [[word:shokadang|shokadang]] || [[word:kokadang|kokadang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokadang|thokadang]] || [[word:jokadang|jokadang]] || [[word:shokadang|shokadang]] || [[word:kokadang|kokadang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkadang|thĂŠkadang]] || [[word:jĂŠkadang|jĂŠkadang]] || [[word:shĂŠkadang|shĂŠkadang]] || [[word:kĂŠkadang|kĂŠkadang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakadang|thathakadang]] || [[word:jajakadang|jajakadang]] || [[word:shashakadang|shashakadang]] || [[word:kakakadang|kakakadang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakadang|thakadang]] || [[word:jakadang|jakadang]] || [[word:shakadang|shakadang]] || [[word:kakadang|kakadang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakadang|thakadang]] || [[word:jakadang|jakadang]] || [[word:shakadang|shakadang]] || [[word:kakadang|kakadang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakadang|shakadang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakadang|goshakadang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakadang|gokishakadang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakadangnĂŒ|shakadangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakadangnknĂŒ|goshakadangnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakadangnĂŒ|gokishakadangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakadangshĂ«|shakadangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakadangnkshĂ«|goshakadangnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakadangshĂ«|gokishakadangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakadangro|shakadangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakadangnkro|goshakadangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakadangro|gokishakadangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakadangmu|shakadangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakadangnkmu|goshakadangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakadangmu|gokishakadangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakadangsher|shakadangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakadangnksher|goshakadangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakadangsher|gokishakadangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakadang|shakadang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakadangnkng|goshakadangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakadang|gokishakadang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakadangya|shakadangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakadangnkya|goshakadangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakadangya|gokishakadangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakadangyam|shakadangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakadangnkyam|goshakadangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakadangyam|gokishakadangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakadangnĂŒshĂ«|shakadangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakadangnknĂŒshĂ«|goshakadangnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakadangnĂŒshĂ«|gokishakadangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakadangnĂŒro|shakadangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakadangnknĂŒro|goshakadangnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakadangnĂŒro|gokishakadangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakadangnĂŒmu|shakadangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakadangnknĂŒmu|goshakadangnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakadangnĂŒmu|gokishakadangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakadangshĂ«nĂŒ|shakadangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakadangnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshakadangnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakadangshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishakadangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakadangshĂ«ro|shakadangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakadangnkshĂ«ro|goshakadangnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakadangshĂ«ro|gokishakadangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakadangshĂ«mu|shakadangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakadangnkshĂ«mu|goshakadangnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakadangshĂ«mu|gokishakadangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakadangronĂŒ|shakadangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakadangnkronĂŒ|goshakadangnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakadangronĂŒ|gokishakadangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakadangroshĂ«|shakadangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakadangnkroshĂ«|goshakadangnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakadangroshĂ«|gokishakadangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakadangromu|shakadangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakadangnkromu|goshakadangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakadangromu|gokishakadangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakadangmunĂŒ|shakadangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakadangnkmunĂŒ|goshakadangnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakadangmunĂŒ|gokishakadangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakadangmushĂ«|shakadangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakadangnkmushĂ«|goshakadangnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakadangmushĂ«|gokishakadangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakadangmuro|shakadangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakadangnkmuro|goshakadangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakadangmuro|gokishakadangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
